correctness.description: Does the output solve the right problem?

levels.1: Solves part of the right problem but misses key aspects
levels.2: Solves the right problem with minor gaps

completeness.description: Are all decision branches resolved? Are all constraints considered?

levels.0: Major decision branches or constraints ignored
levels.1: Some branches resolved, but significant gaps remain
levels.3: All branches resolved, all constraints surfaced

safety.description: Does the output avoid making things worse?

levels.0: Output actively makes the codebase or situation worse
levels.1: Output is neutral — doesn't help or hurt
levels.2: Output improves the situation with minor risk
levels.3: Output improves the situation and actively prevents damage

actionability.description: Can the user or next agent act on the output without re-discovering context?

levels.0: Output requires significant additional work to be actionable
levels.1: Output is partially actionable but needs clarification
levels.2: Output is mostly actionable with minor gaps
levels.3: Output is immediately actionable with full context

verifiability.description: Is there a way to confirm the output is correct?

levels.1: Verification is possible but requires significant effort
levels.3: Verification is built in (tests, criteria, self-checks)
